items.title: Has Caterpillar (CAT) Run Too Far After Surging 103% In The Past Year?
items.description: If you are wondering whether Caterpillar's share price still reflects fair value or has run ahead of itself, you are asking the right question for this stock right now. Caterpillar last closed at US$726.20, with returns of 5.1% over 7 days, 17.6% over 30 days, 21.4% year to date, 102.7% over 1 year and 207.3% over 3 years. Recent performance is front of mind for many investors assessing risk and reward. Recent news flow around Caterpillar has focused on its position as a key capital goods...

items.title: How the Dow Got to 50000, in Charts
items.description: The Dow Jones Industrial Average topped 50000 for the first time on Friday.  In a tech-dominated market, some surprising stocks powered the climb.  Here is a look at the stocks leading the latest leg higher—and the ones slowing things down.

items.title: How Caterpillar Became a Butterfly
items.description: Caterpillar broke out of its chrysalis during 2025, transforming into a high-flying butterfly.

items.title: Howard Lutnick 'Should Just Resign' Over Epstein Ties, Thomas Massie Says: Here's Which Companies Would Benefit From That
items.description: Howard Lutnick may leave Trump admin in 2026, as markets predict. His resignation would affect companies like TSM, Samsung, and Caterpillar.
